testcase.name: refreshWithExpiredTokenReturns401

testcase.name: logoutWithoutRefreshTokenSucceeds
testcase.system-out: 14:36:41.121 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext&amp#27;[0;39m - Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 14:36:41.121 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.t.w.s.TestDispatcherServlet&amp#27;[0;39m - Initializing Servlet '' 14:36:41.123 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.t.w.s.TestDispatcherServlet&amp#27;[0;39m - Completed initialization in 2 ms 14:36:41.171 &amp#27;[39mDEBUG&amp#27;[0;39m [main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy&amp#27;[0;39m - Securing POST /api/v1/auth/logout 14:36:41.172 &amp#27;[39mDEBUG&amp#27;[0;39m [main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter&amp#27;[0;39m - Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext 14:36:41.172 &amp#27;[39mDEBUG&amp#27;[0;39m [main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy&amp#27;[0;39m - Secured POST /api/v1/auth/logout

testcase.name: getMeWithValidTokenReturnsProfile

testcase.name: getMeWithoutTokenReturns401
testcase.system-out: 14:36:41.879 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext&amp#27;[0;39m - Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 14:36:41.880 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.t.w.s.TestDispatcherServlet&amp#27;[0;39m - Initializing Servlet '' 14:36:41.881 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.t.w.s.TestDispatcherServlet&amp#27;[0;39m - Completed initialization in 1 ms 14:36:41.906 &amp#27;[39mDEBUG&amp#27;[0;39m [main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy&amp#27;[0;39m - Securing GET /api/v1/auth/me 14:36:41.906 &amp#27;[39mDEBUG&amp#27;[0;39m [main] &amp#27;[36mo.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter&amp#27;[0;39m - Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext
